instruction: Go down the hall past some plants towards a doorway to the hot tub and some lounge chairs.  Stop in front of the large tub.

text: I'll start by looking at my current surroundings.
I notice a hallway with a plant ahead and I'm moving forward to explore it.
I see a hallway ahead with a plant on the right. Let me move forward down the hall past the plants.
I'm moving forward through the space, noticing a plant and an opening ahead, with a doorway visible to my left.
The hall opens up ahead with a plant. Let me continue forward past the plant.

I'm noticing the layout of this space—there are stairs on the left, a plant to the right, and a dark doorway beyond it. The instructions mention heading toward a hot tub, so I should explore that doorway to the right.
There are stairs to the left and a plant ahead. I need to find the doorway to the hot tub. Let me look around by turning.
I notice there's a wall on the right side, and to the left there's a dark doorway partially obscured by a plant—let me investigate that opening more closely.
That's a wall to the right. The doorway/opening seems to be to the left near the plant. Let me turn back left.

I'm noticing the layout of the room—stairs on the left, a plant and painting on the right, and a dark doorway opening in the middle-right area. Since the goal is to find the hot tub, that dark opening seems like the most promising direction to explore.
I see stairs on the left and a dark doorway opening to the right behind the plant. The hot tub is likely through that doorway. Let me head toward the doorway on the right.

I notice there's a dark opening behind the plant that could be a doorway, though the plant is blocking my view of it. Let me turn around and get a full sense of the space to better understand the layout.
The plant is right in front of me and there's a dark opening to the left. Let me survey the area with a full turn to understand the layout.

I'm noticing the wooden double doors on the left and the staircase on the right—either could lead to the hot tub area. Since hot tubs are typically in elevated or separate spaces, the stairs seem more likely, but I should keep exploring to see what's actually up there before committing to a direction.
I see large wooden double doors and stairs going up. Let me continue the turn to see the rest.
I'm spotting a tiled doorway that looks like it leads to a spa or bathroom area—possibly where the hot tub is. Let me finish turning around to get the full view before heading through.
I see a doorway leading into a tiled room - this could be the doorway to the hot tub area. Let me finish the turn to confirm the full layout.
I've hit a wall and need to backtrack. The doorway to the tiled room was six steps back to my left, so I'm turning around to head back that way.
This is a wall. The doorway to the tiled room was a bit back. Let me turn left to face it again.
I notice the plant on the left side and need to adjust my direction toward the tiled room's doorway, so I'm turning more to the left.

I'm noticing this view matches what I saw earlier, with that dark opening behind the painting. The tiled room doorway must be somewhere else entirely. Let me work through the sequence again—I saw the double doors and stairs at one point, then the tiled doorway at another, and I need to figure out how these locations actually connect based on my turns and movements. I'm realizing I've completed a full rotation and I'm back at the starting orientation, just slightly off. The tiled room with stone walls seems like the spa area I'm looking for, so I need to turn left 180° to face it. But I'm second-guessing whether the stairs or the tiled doorway leads to the hot tub—the stairs could go up to a rooftop area with lounge chairs, while the tiled room looks more like an indoor spa. Let me head toward the tiled doorway since it visually matches a wet area.
I've completed a survey. The tiled spa-like room (potential hot tub) was seen when facing ~180° from here. Let me turn to face that doorway.
I'm approaching the tiled doorway ahead—there's a wooden door on the left and an open stone room entrance slightly to my left-center. Let me move forward toward it.
I'm now facing the doorway into the tiled stone room. Let me approach it.

I'm stepping through the doorway into a stone-tiled room with plant life and walls, but the hot tub isn't visible yet from this vantage point. Let me adjust my angle slightly to the left and move forward to get a better view of the space.
I'm at the doorway of the stone-tiled room. Let me go through it. The opening is slightly to my left.
I'm stepping into the stone-tiled room with plants in the corners, but the hot tub still isn't visible. There's a doorway on the right side, so I'll move deeper into the space to explore further.
I'm entering the stone-tiled room with plants. Let me move in further and look for the hot tub.

I'm in a stone room with an "ART" display made from stones and candles—looks like a spa area. There's a tiled bathroom visible through a doorway on the right, but I haven't spotted the hot tub yet. Let me explore the rest of this room by turning left to see what else is here.
This is a spa-like stone room. There's a door on the right leading to another tiled room. Let me look around this room to find the tub. Turning left first.
I spot a blue-lit doorway ahead that looks like it opens into a pool or hot tub area, with water visible and a plant nearby. I'm heading toward it to explore further.
I can see a doorway ahead with a blue-lit room beyond it - that's likely the pool/hot tub area! Let me head toward that doorway.

I can see the doorway leading into the blue-lit room now, and there's a tub or pool visible inside with the same blue lighting. I'm turning slightly left to approach the doorway and moving forward toward the hot tub area.
I can now see the doorway clearly with a tub visible in the blue-lit room beyond. Let me approach it.
I'm moving toward the doorway on my right, heading into the blue-lit room where I can make out what appears to be a tub.
The doorway is to my right now with the blue-lit hot tub room visible. Let me turn right and go through.
I can see into the blue-lit hot tub room now—there's a tub and lounge chairs visible on the left side. The doorway is right ahead of me, slightly to the left, so I'll head through it.
I can clearly see the hot tub room through the doorway - a blue-lit tub and what appears to be lounge chairs. Let me go through the doorway.
I'm stepping through the doorway into the hot tub room, taking in the setup with the large blue tub, lounge chair, and circular window before moving closer to the tub.
I'm at the threshold of the hot tub room. I can see the large tub with blue water and lounge chairs. Let me step through into the room.
I'm moving through the hot tub room, navigating around the door on my left to get a better view of the large pool with blue water on the right side, then turning to approach it more directly.
I'm now inside the hot tub room. I can see the large tub with blue water on the right and lounge chairs on the left. Let me move toward the tub, turning right slightly.

I'm getting a better sense of the space now—the hot tub with its blue water is right in front of me, with lounge chairs off to the left. I need to move forward to position myself directly in front of the tub.
I'm in the hot tub room now. The large tub is ahead with lounge chairs on the left. Let me move forward toward the tub.
I can see the hot tub room clearly now with the central tub, lounge chairs, and circular windows matching the destination. Moving closer to position myself directly in front of the large tub.
This is the hot tub room with the large tub in the center and lounge chairs on the left - exactly as described. Let me move a bit closer to be right in front of the large tub.
I've reached the large hot tub with the blue water, positioned in front of it as instructed. I'm within a couple meters of the edge, confirming I'm at the correct endpoint, so I'm issuing STOP.
I'm now right in front of the large hot tub, with lounge chairs to the left. This matches the instruction endpoint perfectly. I'll stop here.

I've successfully completed the navigation. 

I followed the instruction by:
1. Going down the hall past the plants (there were several plants along the corridor)
2. Continuing through the doorways toward the spa/pool area
3. Passing through the tiled stone room and into the blue-lit hot tub room
4. Stopping in front of the large hot tub, with the lounge chairs visible on the left

The final view shows me positioned directly in front of the large blue-lit tub with the lounge chairs to the side and the distinctive circular windows in the background — exactly matching the described endpoint: "the hot tub and some lounge chairs. Stop in front of the large tub."
